description: Touch targets on product cards are smaller than 44x44px
expectedBehavior: All interactive elements meet WCAG 2.5.5 minimum touch target size of 44x44px
actualBehavior: Add to Cart buttons render at 32px height on mobile viewports
testHint: At 375px viewport, assert all buttons have height >= 44px

description: Order history table causes horizontal scroll on mobile
expectedBehavior: Table adapts to viewport width with no horizontal overflow
actualBehavior: Orders table overflows viewport at widths below 480px
testHint: At 375px viewport, assert document body has no horizontal scrollbar

description: Sticky nav covers form input when mobile keyboard opens
expectedBehavior: Active input fields remain visible above keyboard
actualBehavior: Search input is hidden behind fixed nav when keyboard opens on iOS Safari
testHint: Focus search input at 375px and assert input is within visible viewport

description: Product images overflow their container at 320px
expectedBehavior: Images scale within card boundaries at all viewport sizes
actualBehavior: Images exceed card width at 320px viewport causing layout break
testHint: At 320px viewport, assert all product images have width <= parent container width

description: Modal cannot be dismissed on small screens — close button scrolls out of view
expectedBehavior: Modal close button is always accessible regardless of viewport height
actualBehavior: Close button is off-screen on devices with viewport height under 600px
testHint: Open modal at 375x600 viewport and assert close button is within visible bounds

description: Font size below 16px on input fields triggers iOS zoom
expectedBehavior: Input fields use font-size >= 16px to prevent auto-zoom on iOS
actualBehavior: Search and quantity inputs use font-size: 14px causing iOS to zoom on focus
testHint: Assert all input elements have computed font-size >= 16px

description: Cart quantity stepper buttons too close together for touch
expectedBehavior: Increment and decrement buttons have adequate spacing for touch input
actualBehavior: Plus and minus buttons are 4px apart, causing frequent mis-taps on mobile
testHint: Assert gap between quantity stepper buttons is >= 8px at 375px viewport

description: Hero section text overflows on 320px viewport
expectedBehavior: All text wraps cleanly with no overflow at any supported viewport
actualBehavior: Hero headline clips at the right edge on 320px wide screens
testHint: At 320px viewport, assert hero heading has no text clipping or overflow: hidden cutoff
